title: Beta distribution and associated Stirling numbers of the second kind
journal: Probability and Mathematical Statistics, 2024, Vol. 44, Fasc. 1, 119--132
journal_ref: Probability and Mathematical Statistics, 2024, Vol. 44, Fasc. 1, 119--132
abstract: This article gives a formula for associated Stirling numbers of the second kind based on the moment of a sum of independent random variables having a beta distribution. From this formula we deduce, using probabilistic approaches, lower and upper bounds for these numbers.
